title: pleioluma foxworthyi
intro: Pleioluma foxworthyi, also known as the Foxworth's pleioluma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of New Guinea. The medicinal properties of Pleioluma foxworthyi are attributed to its bark, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of the plant include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and it can be used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Pleioluma foxworthyi include extracts and infusions made from the bark, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves.
